reviews.author: Pooja Rani
reviews.title: BB Cream.
reviews.body: It is good but do not hide dark circles.

sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
The Studd Muffyn BB Cream is an absolute travel essential if you're always on the go! It's compact in size and dynamite in what it does for your skin!

Not only this will be going to make your skin an even tone but will also aid in covering blemishes and dark spots. 

◙ NOTE:- People with sensitive skin are advised to perform a patch test. If a rash, redness, or itching appears, stop using it.

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
1-Is enriched with Vitamin C, Vitamin E, Shea Butter and Cocoa

2-Even skin tone, hides dark circles, covers acne scars, blemishes and spots.

3-Suitable for All Skin types.

4-it makes your skin feel smooth instantly.

5-Its giving you a one tone brighter look

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text:
Dab cream over the entire face and spread evenly to match the skin tone.
